Tom Moreno: Tomorrow sounds perfect! I appreciate you being so involved in this with me, Jane. It's nice to have someone to bounce ideas off of. And I can't wait for those pancakes, by the way! Anything else exciting planned for today?
Jane Moreno: Today I also have some grocery shopping planned. Do you need anything from the store? After that, I’ll tidy up the house and spend some time reading. How about you? Any plans after work?
Tom Moreno: I don’t think I need anything right now, but I’ll let you know if something comes to mind. After work, I might just relax at home and catch up on some reading myself. It sounds like a busy day for you! Let’s make sure to set aside time tonight to go over our notes for the election. I really want to be prepared.
Jane Moreno: Sounds good, Tom! I hope you find some interesting books to read. I'll make sure to have everything ready for our discussion tonight. Enjoy your day at the store! Let me know if anything comes up later. Love you!
Tom Moreno: Thanks, Jane! I'll see you later for dinner and our discussion. Love you too! Have a great day!
